content:
🚀 GSAP | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Creating high-performance, complex animations for web development across all major browsers.
✨ Key Features: • Framework-agnostic JavaScript animation library • High-performance animations • Works in every major browser • Animates CSS, SVG, canvas, React, Vue, WebGL, colors, strings, motion paths, generic objects
📖 Summary: GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform) is a high-performance JavaScript animation library for the modern web. It enables developers to create complex animations across all major browsers for various elements like CSS, SVG, and even generic JavaScript objects, with optional plugins for advanced effects like scroll-based animations and motion paths.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
